input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule V.4.2.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: v.4.2.2
            TITLE: teams using modified lug bolts or custom designs must provide proof that good engineering

            CONTENT:
            rule V.4.2.2: Teams using modified lug bolts or custom designs must provide proof that Good Engineering
V.4.2.2 Teams using modified lug bolts or custom designs must provide proof that Good Engineering 
Practices have been followed in their design.

final_answer: Teams using modified lug bolts or custom designs must provide proof that Good Engineering Practices have been followed in their design.
